en.extract:
The spangled honeyeater (Melipotes ater) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae.
It is endemic to the Huon Peninsula (Papua New Guinea).
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''spangled honeyeater''' ('''''Melipotes ater''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Huon Peninsula]] (Papua New Guinea).

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
